notes.method: Relative percentile-style score across Victorian LGAs using selected recorded offence counts for 2025.
notes.warning: This is LGA-level offence context, not suburb-level crime and not per-capita crime rates. Non-residential burglary has been omitted from this VIC dataset pending a cleaner mapping.

display.headline: Low caution
display.summary: Lower relative offence context compared with other Victorian LGAs.

notes.method: Relative percentile-style score across Victorian LGAs using selected recorded offence counts for 2025.
notes.warning: This is LGA-level offence context, not suburb-level crime and not per-capita crime rates. Non-residential burglary has been omitted from this VIC dataset pending a cleaner mapping.
